name: python3-elasticsearch
title: python3-elasticsearch
description:
Python client for Elasticsearch (Python3 version)
Official low-level client for Elasticsearch. Its goal is to provide common
ground for all Elasticsearch-related code in Python; because of this it tries
to be opinion-free and very extendable.
.
The client's features include:
* translating basic Python data types to and from json (datetimes are not
decoded for performance reasons)
* configurable automatic discovery of cluster nodes
* persistent connections
* load balancing (with pluggable selection strategy) across all available
nodes
* failed connection penalization (time based - failed connections won't be
retried until a timeout is reached)
* thread safety
* pluggable architecture
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-elasticsearch because Python client for Elasticsearch (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-elasticsearch as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-elasticsearch with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-elasticsearch --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
